info.title: Hexfit API
info.description: Hexfit API for fitness and health management

post.description: This page allowed you to archive a actor from a file

parameters.name: link_id
parameters.description: The link between the actor and the file. If you don't have this information, you can use the actor_id param with user_id or group_id

parameters.name: reverse
parameters.description: Allowed you to reverse the archive action

post.description: This page allowed you to add a new actor to a client file
This page allowed you to delete a actor from a file

parameters.name: link_id
parameters.description: The link between the actor and the file. If you don't have this information, you can use the actor_id param with user_id or group_id

get.description: This page allowed you to retrive the information about actor

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search inside firstname, lastname, email, etc.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The name of the field with "-" before for DESC

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: If count=true it will return only the number of entry found.

get.description: This page allowed you to retrive the information about clients

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search inside firstname, lastname, email, etc.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The name of the field with "-" before for DESC

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: If count=true it will return only the number of entry found.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: If you want the archived clients or not

get.description: This page allowed you to retrive the information about employees

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search inside firstname, lastname, email, etc.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The name of the field with "-" before for DESC

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: If count=true it will return only the number of entry found.

post.description: Create new meta

parameters.name: include_units
parameters.description: If you want to include units into the response

parameters.name: unit_id
parameters.description: If you want in a specific unit

post.description: This page allowed you to upload a document
This page allowed you to create a new event
This page allowed you to edit an event

get.description: This page allowed you to get the exercises

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Partner apikey to verify identity + connexion

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search inside firstname, lastname, email, etc.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The name of the field with "-" before for DESC

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: The lang in which the exercise will be return (EN-EN or FR-FR) Default at the user lang

parameters.name: favorite
parameters.description: If you want only the favorite or not

post.description: This page allowed you to edit a folder
This page allowed you to create a new document

parameters.name: document_id
parameters.description: Document's id you want to send

parameters.name: db_id
parameters.description: Instance id where you want the document to be send

parameters.name: fill_by
parameters.description: "true" if you want to send it to the client(s)

post.description: This page allows you send a notification to the user

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Number for user id or array of user id

get.description: If this page answer, the API is online
This page return the timezone in the database with their ID

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: The lang of the training, default to the professional lang

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Print in color or black and white

parameters.name: note_type
parameters.description: If you want the exercises' directive

parameters.name: text_size_adjust
parameters.description: Any number to increase or decrease the font size (ex: 1.2 = 20% bigger)

parameters.name: db_id
parameters.description: The client id or group id for who the training has been created

parameters.name: is_draft
parameters.description: If true, return only draft training, if false, return training without drafts

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: If true, return only archive trainings, if false, return active trainings

get.description: This page allowed you to get the user information by using a email only

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email of the user you want to verify.

post.description: This page allowed you to create a new client

parameters.name: actor_id
parameters.description: L'ID du professionnel qui deviendra le premier intervenant / False means no actor

parameters.name: branch_id
parameters.description: This params will set the users to be under a branch

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: If a ID is passed, all the other params are ignored and a new welcome email is send. Not available if the client is already connect. If no user_id : firstname, lastname and sexe are required

post.description: This page allowed you to create a new professional under your enterprise

parameters.name: branch_id
parameters.description: Ce paramètre peut aussi être un Number

post.description: This page desactive your APIKEY

get.description: This page allowed you to retrive the information about users

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search inside firstname, lastname, email, etc.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The name of the field with "-" before for DESC

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: If count=true it will return only the number of entry found.

post.description: This page allowed you to connect and receive a APIKEY in exchange

parameters.name: device_key
parameters.description: The key from where you access the system

post.description: This page allowed you to create meta (phone, address, secondary email) for an user

parameters.name: meta
parameters.description: An array of the meta you want to add.(ex : {value: '', name: '', type: ''})

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The meta type you want to insert

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the meta (Ex: Work, Cellphone, Home, etc)

post.description: This page allowed you to delete meta (phone, address, secondary email) for an user

parameters.name: meta_id
parameters.description: ID of the meta you want to delete

post.description: This page allowed you to create meta (phone, address, secondary email) for an user

parameters.name: meta_id
parameters.description: ID of the meta you want to delete

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The meta type you want to insert

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the meta (Ex: Work, Cellphone, Home, etc)

post.description: This page allowed you change the information of an user

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Must have the password_confirm param with this one

get.description: This page allowed you to get the user information by using a email only

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Partner apikey to verify identity + connexion

get.description: This page allows you to get a temporary password for support purpose.

parameters.name: access_token
parameters.description: access_token of the user you want to support

post.description: This page allows you to verify the connection of a user

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Where Hexfit should send the user after the user grants or denies consent

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: A space-delimited list of the permissions you are requesting

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User_id of the client you want to connect with

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email of the client you want to connect with

post.description: This page allows you to exchange your token for a real authorization

parameters.name: refresh_token
parameters.description: The refresh token issued to you
